answers.label: Undergraduate (studying for or completed a Bachelor's)
I like creating, designing, or making things
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work

milestones.title: Degree / Formal Education
milestones.description: Enroll in and complete a bachelor's degree relevant to commercial pilot (focus on coursework covering cpl/ir licence operations, and vfr and ifr flight operations)

resources.title: Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University - Bachelor of Science in Aeronautical Science
ATP Flight School - Airline Career Pilot Program (Part 141)
Purdue University - Bachelor of Science in Professional Flight Technology
University of North Dakota - Commercial Aviation Program (BS)
FAA Airman Certification Standards (ACS) & Practical Test Standards (PTS)

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in cpl/ir licence operations, vfr and ifr flight operations, and aircraft systems knowledge — these are the essential building blocks for a commercial pilot

resources.title: FAA Pilot's Handbook of Aeronautical Knowledge (PHAK)
FAR/AIM (Federal Aviation Regulations/Aeronautical Information Manual) - ASA Edition
Sporty's Learn to Fly Course (Private Pilot Online Ground School)
King Schools Online Instrument Rating Ground School & Test Prep
NOAA Aviation Weather Center

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in flight planning and fuel management, emergency procedures, and navigation and meteorology, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Multi-Crew Cooperation (MCC) & Jet Orientation Course (JOC)
Airline Pilot Interview & Psychometric Preparation Course
Advanced Upset Prevention and Recovery Training (UPRT)
Aviation Risk and Safety Management Online Course (EASA Compliant)

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing supervised driving or operating sessions, route planning, and practical navigation exercises — focus on applying cpl/ir licence operations, and vfr and ifr flight operations in realistic scenarios

resources.title: X-Plane 12 Flight Simulator
Sporty's Commercial Pilot Test Prep Course & Checkride Prep
FAA Commercial Pilot Airman Certification Standards (ACS)
FAA Airplane Flying Handbook (AFH)

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio showcasing your best work, completed projects, certifications, and any measurable achievements related to commercial pilot

resources.title: LogTen Pro Professional Pilot Logbook App
Pilot Career Center: Resume & Cover Letter Advice for Pilots
AviationInterviews.com Pilot Interview Preparation Resources
FAA Airman Certificate and Rating Online Verification (Understand Employer Verification)
AeroGuard Flight School: How Pilots Maximize Their LinkedIn Profiles

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your commercial pilot skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Airline Pilot Club: Comprehensive Pilot CV Guide
Optimizing Your LinkedIn Profile (LinkedIn Learning Course)
Resume, Cover Letter and LinkedIn Profile Optimization (Coursera Specialization)
AviationInterviews.com: Pilot Interview Preparation Guide
Effective Business Writing (Coursera Course)

milestones.title: Job Application
milestones.description: Apply for commercial pilot positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

milestones.title: Foundation & Core Skills
milestones.description:
Enroll in and complete a bachelor's degree relevant to commercial pilot (focus on coursework covering cpl/ir licence operations, and vfr and ifr flight operations)

Then: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in cpl/ir licence operations, vfr and ifr flight operations, and aircraft systems knowledge — these are the essential building blocks for a commercial pilot

milestones.title: Skill Building & Practice
milestones.description:
Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in flight planning and fuel management, emergency procedures, and navigation and meteorology, applying them through exercises and case studies

Then: Gain hands-on experience by completing supervised driving or operating sessions, route planning, and practical navigation exercises — focus on applying cpl/ir licence operations, and vfr and ifr flight operations in realistic scenarios

milestones.title: Portfolio & Professional Profile
milestones.description:
Build a professional portfolio showcasing your best work, completed projects, certifications, and any measurable achievements related to commercial pilot

Then: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your commercial pilot skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

milestones.title: Job Application
milestones.description: Apply for commercial pilot positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
